arts.ttl: Sources: Tottenham are in the mix to sign defender who once left Carlo Ancelotti stunned
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti even managed the Tottenham target 👀

arts.ttl: Real Madrid up offer to Liverpool for Alexander-Arnold – Hoping tough January changes Reds stance
arts.sum: Real Madrid have now officially raised their bid for Trent Alexander-Arnold to £15m, but Liverpool are still refusing to play ball. That is according to Cadena SER, who say Real Madrid will not go any further than that and wait for the summer if Liverpool continue to say no. arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies’ Real Madrid move hangs in the balance; the Canadian’s future remains up in the air
arts.sum: Few transfer sagas have dragged in quite as much as that of Bayern Munich wing-back Alphonso Davies. The 24-year-old has been the subject of interest of Real Madrid for what…

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Real Madrid to make second Trent Alexander-Arnold bid?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly contemplating whether to make a second bid for Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Valencia
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Friday’s away match against Valencia, which was initially scheduled to be played in October until the floods in the Valencia region occurred. Real Madrid will have decent depth in the midfield, although Ancelotti will likely deploy Tchouameni alongside Rudiger in the center of the defensive line.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms David Alaba’s planned Real Madrid comeback date
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that a target date has been pencilled in for David Alaba’s return to competitive action. And the news will no doubt bring…

arts.ttl: What did Carlo Ancelotti say about free agent Trent Alexander-Arnold?
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti gave his first press conference of the New Year to look ahead to the team’s opening game of 2025 against Valencia . Both Ancelotti and his Liverpool counterpart Arne Slot have kept on the margins when it comes to players' contracts but in this afternoon’s press conference, the Madrid coach was asked about the club’s involvement and plans for the winter window.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Valencia
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Thursday unveiled the club’s travelling squad for their upcoming meeting with Valencia. Carlo Ancelotti’s troops, of course, are set to kick their endeavours…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti breaks silence on Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer after Real Madrid bid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are pushing to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold in the January transfer window as a replacement for the injured Dani Carvajal, but Liverpool want to keep their star right-back

arts.ttl: Valencia with new coach plays Real Madrid nearly 2 months after postponement
arts.sum: Hoping for a boost from a new coach, struggling Valencia gets an early start to the new year by facing Real Madrid in a La Liga game postponed two months ago because of the deadly floods. The game on Friday comes after more than 200 people died in the massive floods in the Valencia region, and with the club still trying to overcome poor results and ongoing fan protests against Singaporean owner Peter Lim.
